leap.title: Da el salto
leap.body: Mejora tu juego con coaching 1:1 en vivo — la misma ventaja que usan los pros, para cada atleta.

coaches.title: Encuentra tu entrenador
coaches.body: Explora expertos verificados por deporte, nivel y horario. Guarda favoritos y reserva cuando quieras.

live.title: Entrena en vivo, donde sea
live.body: Sesiones por video, clips y planes de juego en un solo locker — desde la cancha o desde casa.

cms.blogsSubtitle: Consejos de coaching, novedades y historias del equipo NetQwix.

guestSettings.bannerBody: Inicia sesión o crea una cuenta gratis para reservar, chatear con entrenadores y sincronizar tu locker.
guestSettings.replayIntro: Ver de nuevo el tour de bienvenida

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.benefitBookOneTapText: Pay for lessons from your balance without entering card details every time.
wallet.benefitFasterCheckoutText: Instant lessons confirm quicker when your wallet has enough funds.
wallet.benefitSecureSpendingText: A 6-digit PIN protects larger payments and withdrawals.
wallet.benefitClearHistoryText: See every top-up and payment in your activity feed.
wallet.addFundsSecurelySub: Pay with debit or credit card via Stripe. Funds appear in your wallet for faster checkout.
wallet.shortfallHint: Add at least ${{amount}} to cover your booking.
wallet.fundsAddedBody: ${{amount}} was added to your wallet. You can use it for bookings right away.
wallet.trainerWalletSub: Earnings from sessions are paid to your connected Stripe account. Trainees add funds here to pay for lessons with debit or credit card.

wallet.pinProtects: Your PIN protects larger payments. Verify before booking or withdrawing.

wallet.pinMismatch: PINs do not match. Try again.

support.heroSub: Have a question about booking, lessons, payments, or your account? Our support team typically replies within one business day (Mon–Fri).
support.tipsBody:
• Instant lessons: both sides must tap Join within 2 minutes.
• Scheduled lessons: use the in-app timer Start when both are connected.
• Refunds or session issues: use Report a technical issue below and pick the session.
support.altTitle: Report a Technical issue / Request a refund
support.altSub: Pick a session and tell us what went wrong.
support.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your question or issue in detail...
support.requiredBody: Please fill in both subject and description.
support.sentBody: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.
support.sendFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.

about.description: NetQwix connects athletes and learners with world-class coaches for live, personalized training sessions. Whether you are an aspiring professional or a dedicated enthusiast, NetQwix brings expert guidance to your screen.
about.howItWorksBody:
1. Trainees book instant or scheduled lessons with verified coaches.
2. Both join the native video room — review clips, draw, and record progress.
3. Coaches deliver game plans and feedback stored in your locker.
about.missionText: To democratize access to expert coaching by making world-class guidance available to everyone, everywhere — through technology that feels as natural as being in the same room as your coach.

liveVideo.title: Live Video Sessions
liveVideo.desc: HD video calls with screen sharing for immersive coaching experiences.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Flexible booking system — schedule instant or recurring sessions.

clips.title: Clip Sharing
clips.desc: Upload, share, and review training clips directly in the platform.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Connect with coaches and learners across every sport and skill.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.desc: Transparent pricing and secure transactions via Stripe.

progress.title: Track Progress
progress.desc: Session reports and ratings to measure and showcase improvement.

sessions.cancelBookingBody: Tu entrenador aún no ha confirmado. Al cancelar ahora se libera el depósito en garantía y se inicia un reembolso completo a tu método de pago original. Los reembolsos suelen aparecer en 5–10 días hábiles.
sessions.cancelBookingPolicy: Puedes cancelar mientras tu entrenador no haya confirmado. Se emite un reembolso completo automáticamente.

sessions.cancelBookingFailed: No se pudo cancelar la reserva.
sessions.offlineCancelBody: Estás sin conexión: cancelaremos esta reserva cuando vuelvas a estar en línea.
sessions.earlyEndBody: Confirma que la lección ha terminado. El entrenador vuelve a estar disponible para reservar el resto de este horario.
